title: Blockchain Pilot Unlocks 24/7 Treasury Liquidity
snippet: A near real-time cross-border, cross-bank redemption of a tokenized U.S. Treasury fund was successfully completed in a pilot conducted by Ondo Finance, Kinexys by J.P. title: Morgan Stanley takes on crypto trading rivals with E*Trade pilot

title: OpenTrade raises $17M to expand stablecoin yield infrastructure after topping $200M TVL
snippet: OpenTrade raises $17 million as the stablecoin platform tops $200 million in TVL and expands infrastructure targeting neobanks and fintechs.

title: OpenTrade raises $17M as CEO sees stablecoin yield tailwinds
snippet: OpenTrade raised $17 million to expand its stablecoin yield platform, bringing total funding above $30 million as it scales stablecoin yield infrastructure for global clients.

title: Bittrex Wants Its $24 Million Settlement Back, Now That the SEC Is Pro-Crypto
snippet: Now-shuttered crypto exchange Bittrex settled with the SEC back in 2023 after being accused of offering illegally unregistered securities.

title: Dominance of Tether and Circle is a net bad for stablecoins, says Bridge executive

snippet: Yesterday during a Consensus panel, the topic of synthetic tokenized stocks was discussed, with Securitize CEO Carlos Domingo pushing back hard against this type of token. Today there are relatively few tokenized US stocks with full ownership rights, which should change when the DTCC starts rolling

title: Kevin O’Leary says Wall Street’s tokenization boom is all talk without crypto rules
SIX Group wins Swiss approval to offer crypto custody alongside traditional securities
snippet: SIX Group received FINMA approval to provide crypto custody through the same regulated infrastructure used for traditional securities settlement and post-trade services.

title: ‘Clarity Act will pass this summer’: Coinbase CLO Grewal backs stablecoin compromise, urges banks to accept deal
snippet: Coinbase CLO Paul Grewal says the Clarity Act will pass this summer, backing the Tillis-Alsobrooks stablecoin compromise.

title: Switzerland's Amina becomes first regulated bank to custody Canton Coin
snippet: The FINMA-regulated bank's institutional clients will get access to trading and holding Canton Coin through a banking platform instead of crypto-native venues.

title: NYSE tokenization partners warn synthetic stock tokens could mislead retail traders

snippet: Remittance firms are using crypto to bypass parts of traditional settlement infrastructure, but this does not mean SWIFT is disappearing.
